news.t: Your Stock Portfolio Has Too Much Tech. Consider These 12 ETFs.

holdings.infoBox: RSPT is an equity ETF with a total of 75 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 3.20%, Dell Technologies at 2.76%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.66%, Intel at 2.65%, and Seagate Technology Holdings at 2.63%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Technology ETF (RSPT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of S&P 500 technology companies. RSPT was launched on Nov 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Your Stock Portfolio Has Too Much Tech. Consider These 12 ETFs.
data.text: Alternative weighting strategies that rejigger indexes are catching on.
